title: Gmail Inbox Intelligence Input
description: Drops a Friday triage list of stalled Gmail client threads by SLA breach age. gmail.readonly only, no scraper, no bulk sender. Don't want to set OAuth up yourself? $99 Done-For-You triage report on Gumroad — I run the scan, you get the 1-page report in 7 days.

query.title: Gmail Query
query.description: Gmail search query syntax, e.g. newer_than:7d in:inbox

max_results.title: Max Results
max_results.description: Maximum number of threads to inspect in this run.

oauth_token.title: OAuth Config
oauth_token.description: Your own Gmail OAuth values. We do not persist your Gmail data or token secrets.

refresh_token.title: Refresh Token
refresh_token.description: OAuth refresh token for Gmail API

openai_api_key.title: LLM API Key (Optional)
openai_api_key.description: Optional API key for `summarizer` (thread summaries) and `reengage_angle` (drafts 3 re-engage email options per cold thread grounded in recent news). Both features work without a key — summarizer skips, reengage_angle still returns news headlines.

summary_model.title: Summary Model
summary_model.description: Optional model name for summarizer feature.

free_tier_user_id.title: Free Tier User ID
free_tier_user_id.description: Stable identifier for monthly free quota tracking in KeyValueStore.

sla_days.title: SLA Days (reply_metrics / reengage_angle)
sla_days.description: Days of silence after which a thread is flagged as over-SLA / cold (cold tier).

dormant_days.title: Dormant Days (reengage_angle)
dormant_days.description: Threads silent this long enter the 'dormant' tier — context has faded, fresh news-grounded re-entry required (matches the 6-month-cold scenario in r/sales 1tdngew).

include_reengage_angles.title: Include Re-engage News Angles (reply_metrics only)
include_reengage_angles.description: When running `reply_metrics`, append Google News headlines about each over-SLA thread's counterparty as suggested re-engage angles. Same data the standalone `reengage_angle` feature returns, but inline. No API key required.

news_lookback_days.title: News Lookback Days (reengage_angle)
news_lookback_days.description: How far back to search Google News for re-engage angle headlines.

max_news_per_thread.title: Max News Items Per Thread (reengage_angle)
max_news_per_thread.description: Cap on how many Google News headlines to return per cold thread.

from_domains.title: Filter by Sender Domains (reply_metrics only)
from_domains.description: Optional list of sender domains to restrict reply_metrics scope. Empty = all domains.

dry_run.title: Dry Run
dry_run.description: If true, validates input and auth flow without full feature execution.
